phase: Phase D - Measurement, Revenue, Conversion, And Platform QA
decision: Phase D is complete locally as a governed measurement, revenue, conversion, platform-readback, experiment, and monitoring contract. Growth-ready classification remains blocked until Phase E verifies source parity, provider evidence, production behavior, live crawl/browser QA, drift baseline, platform readback, owner approvals, and D-4 checkout warnings.
evidence_unavailable: Search Console authenticated property and URL Inspection readback
Google Business Profile owner diagnostics and local action metrics
Live booking, order, payment, fulfillment, invoice, retention, support, refund, return, cancellation, and no-show exports
Finance-approved revenue, VAT, fee, refund, margin, CAC, and contribution definitions
Legal/privacy approval for analytics vendor scope, retention, identifiers, consent, and deletion process

extra_growth_layer.purpose: Define approved business outcome, source systems, owners, consent model, status dictionaries, finance treatment, and update cadence.
Keep the KPI tree, event dictionary, key-event policy, PII exclusions, and metric graph schema-valid.
Reconcile analytics events to bookings, orders, payment_events, invoice events, fulfillment statuses, and retention states before reporting business outcomes.
Record dataset envelopes and health readback for Search Console, GBP, Merchant Center, analytics, CrUX/PageSpeed, and logs.
Prove critical service, product, checkout, contact, install booking, and retention journeys are usable, truthful, recoverable, and accessible.
Preregister draft experiments, search controls, guardrails, release annotations, monitoring thresholds, incident workflow, and rollback policy.
Move unresolved platform, production, source parity, drift, provider, and live journey evidence into Phase E with explicit owners.

findings.title: Production robots, sitemap, product sitemap, and merchant feed asset mismatch blocks live platform readiness
findings.evidence: D-3 recorded robots.txt as 404 and sitemap/feed URLs returning HTML rather than expected XML/text.

findings.title: Authenticated platform readback is unavailable
findings.evidence: Search Console, GBP, Merchant Center, analytics, CrUX/PageSpeed, and server-log datasets remain unavailable with dataset envelopes marked unavailable or blocked.

findings.title: Revenue and conversion claims are blocked by missing owner definitions and reconciliation
findings.evidence: D-1/D-2 record missing business outcome, booking/order status, finance, margin, VAT, refund, retention, CAC, and server-correlation approvals.

findings.title: KPI graph is schema-valid but metric quality remains unverified
findings.evidence: kpi_tree_audit.py passed with 0 blockers and 0 criticals, plus 10 metric-quality warnings and 2 weak-relationship advisories.

findings.title: Checkout accessibility warnings block checkout-impacting experiments
findings.evidence: D-4 recorded duplicate checkout submit controls and toast-level validation recovery instead of field-associated errors.

findings.title: Draft experiments are preregistered but instrumentation is not verified
findings.evidence: experiment_guard.py passed with advisory instrumentation-unverified findings for all four draft experiments.

phase_gate.no_guarantee: Rankings, demand, conversion, revenue, and AI inclusion are not guaranteed by Phase D artifacts.
